changes: Integrated a hardcoded Verified FFCS Course List to streamline course selection and eliminate inconsistencies caused by unverified course entries.
Renamed the Dayscholar 'Bus Pass' tab to 'Bus Info' to better align with the available features.
Added a version-tracked browser cache variable to display the changelog modal exactly once per version bump, preventing repetitive popups.
Completely overhauled the FFCS Predictor Social Score algorithm to accurately measure shared classes, shared half-days, and mutually free slots.
Introduced the interactive Social Score Breakdown Modal with a 2D Comparison Matrix heatmap to effortlessly find the ultimate overlapping schedule with friends.
Added ability to seamlessly import a friend's config and instantly cycle through all of their potential FFCS timetable options.
Upgraded the FFCS Timetable UI with unified overlay schedules and improved course list accessibility in friend view.
Deployed seamlessly to GitHub Pages via static export architecture.
Implemented true PWA Offline Fallbacks ensuring native app-like experience even with no internet connection.
Upgraded Attendance module for Desktop with dynamic Skeleton Loaders for instantly perceived performance.
Introduced lazy loading mechanisms for heavy modules like QBank.
Enabled strict TypeScript compilation and initialized unit testing framework for robust code quality.
Introduced Academic Hub grouping all academics together.
Removed redundant schedule, predictor and assignments sections and consolidated them into the Calendar tab.
Implemented seamless Push Notification architecture via Supabase for zero Edge-latency.
Added Admin Broadcast capability to send push notifications to all users.
Added user-configurable, weekly recurring Push Notifications for VITOL classes.
Redesigned the UI with premium Glassmorphism, blurred backdrops, and refined spacing across the app.
Fixed dark mode styling and added a one-time Push Notification opt-in prompt.
Introduced comprehensive Social features including Common Free Slots Grid, Share Schedule, and Friend Timetable modals.
Revamped the Exams section with Academic Performance, Curriculum Page, FFCS Timetable, GPA Predictor, and Marks History tabs.
Implemented marks synchronization and statistics retrieval functionality.
Added comprehensive Dayscholar features including Bus Finder, Bus Fees Display, and an Admin Dashboard.
Enhanced QBank with dedicated API endpoints and UI for Admin Queue, Exam Questions, and Paper Uploads.
Upgraded Profile Page with residential status and calendar type selection.
Overhauled OD Tracker from a popup into a full-screen Focus Mode subpage with Calendar and Heatmap views.
Replaced OD Tracker's retrospective deduction with a dynamic cross-session state monitor to precisely capture Wasted ODs.
Added 'Recovered ODs' tracker for when overridden ODs are manually corrected back to Present.
Added exact 24-hour class timings to the OD History Log.
Fixed heatmap aggregation bug that caused incorrect color rendering for multiple classes on a single day.
Fixed mobile viewport overflow issues on CGPA Predictor and OD Tracker subpages.
Renamed 'QBank Archive' to 'QB' on the mobile navigation bar and repositioned the 'More' tab.
Optimized mobile focus mode to hide distracting tabs and bottom navigation while viewing subpages.
Transformed Settings into a dedicated Profile page inspired by modern UI paradigms.
Integrated Quick Links and Community Links into the new Profile Page.
Removed the redundant Footer and relocated its controls to the Profile Page.
Added dedicated Changelogs/Updates section.
Initial release of AmazeCC.
Added Dashboard, Attendance, Calendar, and QBank tabs.
Integrated FFCS Planner and Social group scheduling.
